mapper.select: SELECT ts.user_id AS userId, MAX(o.owner_name) AS userName, MAX(b.community_id) AS communityId, MAX(u.building_id) AS buildingId FROM nt_announcement_target_snapshot ts LEFT JOIN nt_announcement_read_record rr ON rr.announcement_id = ts.announcement_id AND rr.user_id = ts.user_id LEFT JOIN ow_owner o ON o.user_id = ts.user_id AND o.del_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN ow_property_binding pb ON pb.owner_id = o.id AND pb.status = 0 AND pb.del_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN bs_house h ON h.id = pb.house_id AND h.del_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN bs_unit u ON u.id = h.unit_id AND u.del_flag = 0 LEFT JOIN bs_building b ON b.id = u.building_id AND b.del_flag = 0 WHERE ts.announcement_id = #{announcementId} AND rr.id IS NULL GROUP BY ts.user_id ORDER BY ts.user_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT IGNORE INTO nt_announcement_target_snapshot (announcement_id, user_id, snapshot_time) SELECT DISTINCT #{announcementId}, o.user_id, NOW() FROM ow_owner o WHERE o.del_flag = 0 AND o.user_id IS NOT NULL
